text:
When ever device is trying to reset the end point after power on / off 
getting below error 

<478.223070> [ERROR] - xhci_configure_reset_endpoint:4473 Could not set dequeue ptr for endpoint 3, 0
<478.223195> [ERROR] - xhci_configure_reset_endpoint:4482 Error to set dequeue ptr for endpoint 3, 81, err 18, 0
<483.171393> [ERROR] - xhci_stop_xfer_endpoint:4616 endpoint stop err 3, 81, 25, 0
<483.264122> [ERROR] - xhci_configure_reset_endpoint:4473 Could not set dequeue ptr for endpoint 3, 0
